qa_pairs.question: Who automatically has access to a Principal Investigator's (PI's) Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) award on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: By default, every role sponsored by the PI through their Alliance CCDB registration and any co-PIs listed on the RAC application will have access to the RAC award.

qa_pairs.question: As a Principal Investigator, what are the initial steps to customize which users have access to a specific Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) allocation?
qa_pairs.answer: To select which users can access a RAC allocation, a Principal Investigator should log in to the CCDB portal at https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/. From the 'My Account' menu, they need to select 'Manage RAP Memberships' and then choose the specific Resource Allocation Project (RAP) from the drop-down list.
